series_metadata.series_description: Electronic files that show all securities held in state investment accounts for which the Treasurer of State is the designated provider of investment services. Such accounts include, but are not necessarily limited to: the state regular account, STAR Ohio, and securities lending. Holdings reflected in the file are current as of the close of the previous business day, and a separate file is created each day for each account. Files in this series are automatically generated on a daily basis by the investment inventory management software.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years
